message:
🐛 Fix OPA card hanging by checking clusters sequentially

Changed from parallel Promise.all to sequential for-loop to avoid
overwhelming the kubectlProxy queue (limit of 2 concurrent requests).

Also shows progressive updates as each cluster completes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
